instruction: You are waitlisted for a preferred section of a course. Evaluate your options: (1) Check your waitlist position by reviewing your enrollment status for all courses. (2) Identify which course you are waitlisted for. (3) Check if there is a backup course you could take instead (review available courses and prerequisites). (4) Assess your current course load and GPA (3.10) to determine if adding another course is feasible. (5) Check the calendar for schedule conflicts with both the waitlisted and backup courses. Then send a brief decision message to your advisor (Dr. Nguyen).
